title: TCA Protein Extraction from Diatoms
author: Anna Santin
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bc7rizm6

steps.title: Pellet of around 50 ml of...
steps.instruction: Pellet of around 50 ml of culture in exponential phase (2 million of cells)

steps.title: Wash pellet with 1 ml of TCA 20%
steps.instruction: Wash pellet with 1 ml of TCA 20%

steps.title: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 1 minute
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 1 minute

steps.title: Pour off the supernatant and dilute...
steps.instruction: Pour off the supernatant and dilute in 100 µl of TCA 20%

steps.title: Add Glass-Beads till meniscus and vortex for 7 minutes
steps.instruction: Add Glass-Beads till meniscus and vortex for 7 minutes

steps.title: Add 400 µl of TCA 5%...
steps.instruction: Add 400 µl of TCA 5% and transfer the supernatant in new eppendorf (1.5 ml)

steps.title: Centrifuge at 3000 rpm for 10 minutes (chiarification phase)
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 3000 rpm for 10 minutes (chiarification phase)

steps.title: (now quickly
steps.instruction: (now quickly!) Add 100 µl of 3X SDS Laemmli Buffer (see Materials) and vortex very well to dissolve

steps.title: Add 50 µl Tris Base and...
steps.instruction: Add 50 µl Tris Base and vortex very well to dissolve

steps.title: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 5 minutes

steps.title: Transfer supernatant containing proteins in a new eppendorf
steps.instruction: Transfer supernatant containing proteins in a new eppendorf
